target.title: Draft: security: add Security Matrix runtime-fact audit model
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds a Security Matrix runtime-fact evaluator.
- Models actor, influence source, tool capability, approval state, and operator policy as separate inputs.
- Adds default policy data, a deterministic evaluator, tool capability resolution, an audit-event object builder, tests, and documentation.
- Adds a small before-tool-call fact adapter so future runtime wiring can build the same audit event shape from explicit boundary facts without changing execution behavior.

## Scope

This PR remains non-enforcing and observe-only.

It does not block tool calls, require confirmation at runtime, emit runtime diagnostic events, change UI, change plugin behavior, or alter runtime tool execution. The before-tool-call adapter only builds an audit event object and exposes an explicit opt-in config predicate for future wiring.

## Validation

Validated locally after fast-forwarding to PR head `b335f136c5d1fa6f9863ac7e40f58264f84b6997`.

Commands run:

```bash
pnpm test src/security/security-matrix/evaluate.test.ts src/agents/security-matrix-before-call.test.ts
pnpm changed:lanes --base upstream/main --json
pnpm exec oxlint src/security/security-matrix/ src/agents/security-matrix-before-call.test.ts
node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/security/security-matrix.md
git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD
```

Results:

- Focused tests passed: `src/security/security-matrix/evaluate.test.ts` and `src/agents/security-matrix-before-call.test.ts`
- `Test Files 2 passed (2)`
- `Tests 26 passed (26)`
- changed-lanes reported `core=true`, `coreTests=true`, `docs=true`, `tooling=true`
- changed-lanes reported `extensions=false`, `extensionTests=false`, `apps=false`, `liveDockerTooling=false`, `releaseMetadata=false`, `all=false`
- oxlint reported `Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.`
- docs formatting reported `Docs formatting clean (663 files).`
- `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD` reported no whitespace errors

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Security Matrix runtime-fact evaluation now produces deterministic audit decisions from actor, influence source, capability, approval state, and operator policy. The before-tool-call adapter builds the same audit-event shape from explicit boundary facts without emitting, blocking, or mutating execution.
- Real environment tested: Local Linux checkout at `~/projects/openclaw`, branch `security/matrix-audit-model`, PR head `b335f136c5d1fa6f9863ac7e40f58264f84b6997`, Node via the repository pnpm environment.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  1. Fast-forwarded the local branch to the PR head.
  2. Ran a direct Node behavior probe against the changed source modules with `HEAD_SHA="$(git rev-parse HEAD)" pnpm exec node --import tsx .tmp-security-matrix-real-proof.mts`.
  3. The probe imported `createSecurityMatrixAuditEvent`, `createSecurityMatrixBeforeToolCallAuditEvent`, and `isSecurityMatrixBeforeToolCallAuditEnabled` from the patched source files.
  4. The probe evaluated externally influenced `exec`, local `read_file`, and the adapter gate/event shape.
- Evidence after fix: Terminal transcript from the local checkout:
  ```text
  $ HEAD_SHA="$(git rev-parse HEAD)" pnpm exec node --import tsx .tmp-security-matrix-real-proof.mts
  [proof] pr=92086
  [proof] head_sha=b335f136c5d1fa6f9863ac7e40f58264f84b6997
  [proof] behavior=security-matrix-runtime-fact-evaluation
  [proof-case] external_exec decision=block policyDecision=block matched=policy influencedBy=web_fetch capability=exec
  [proof-case] local_read decision=allow policyDecision=allow matched=policy influencedBy=none capability=read_file
  [proof-case] adapter_gate disabled=false enabled=true
  [proof-case] adapter_event type=security_matrix.evaluated decision=block actor=agent approvalState=not_required operatorPolicy=unknown
  [proof-result] PASS security matrix evaluator and before-tool-call adapter produced expected audit decisions from real source modules
  ```
- Observed result after fix: The patched source modules produced the expected live audit decisions. Externally influenced `exec` resolved to `block`; local `read_file` resolved to `allow`; the before-tool-call audit gate remained disabled by default and enabled only for the explicit config object; the adapter produced a `security_matrix.evaluated` event with `decision=block`.
- What was not tested: Runtime hook emission, runtime enforcement, strict config schema adoption, CLI display, plugin UI, and live tool execution are intentionally not changed by this PR.
